                id,
                name,
                default_duration_seconds,
                auto_advance,
                record_save_enabled,
                capture_enabled,
                grayscale_enabled,
                result_required,
                result_save_path,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            )
            VALUES ('time-step-tag-usage', 'Tag usage', 30, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, NULL, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
